citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: In decision tree learning, each step adds a new node, which tests a single feature value. In neural network learning, each step makes a small change to every weight in the network.
